title: Strict TSConfig, TypeScript 7 Defaults, and Project Graphs
description: Create a clean multi-package configuration that fails on unsafe boundaries, unused work, and incompatible module assumptions. Learners cumulatively produce a strict TypeScript 7 project configuration through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Use strict, noUncheckedIndexedAccess, exactOptionalPropertyTypes, useUnknownInCatchVariables, and override checks from actual risk.
Account for TypeScript 7 strict, target, module, rootDir, types, and side-effect import defaults without legacy no-op flags.
Predict root files from files, include, exclude, imports, types, and library selection.
